Motion To Enforce The Stipulated Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 For Judgment And Order Compelling Performance Forthwith Declaration Of Amanda L Ebey In Support Of Motion To Enforce Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Zoom)
Dennis Vann, 415.621.5654 for Plaintiff Kenneth Garrett.
Amanda Ebey, 415.989.8070 for Defendant Gwendolyn McCary et al.

Argued. Counsel for the Defedant states that payment was not made which is why the Defendant is seeking judgment. The plaintiff does not object to the judgment being entered but does object to the judgment being entered Nunc Pro Tunc and attorney fees.

The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN MCCRAY, DONALD GARRETT Motion To Enforce The Stipulated Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 For Judgment And Order Compelling Performance Forthwith is Granted. The Court states that the prejudgment interest will start from the day of the breach which is October 9, 2020. The request for attorney fees is Denied. Prevailing party to prepare order and judgment in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
